goal: x ∈ set xs ⟹ x ∈ set (xs @ ys)
outline:
lemma "x ∈ set xs ⟹ x ∈ set (xs @ ys)"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    using Nil.prems
    by simp
next
  case (Cons a as)
  have f1: "x = a ∨ x ∈ set as"
    using Cons.prems
    by simp
  have f2: "x ∈ set (as @ ys) ∨ x = a"
    using f1 Cons.IH
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f2
    by simp
qed

goal: set (xs @ ys) = set xs ∪ set ys
outline:
lemma "set (xs @ ys) = set xs ∪ set ys"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "set ((x # xs) @ ys) = insert x (set (xs @ ys))"
    by simp
  have f2: "set (x # xs) ∪ set ys = insert x (set xs ∪ set ys)"
    by simp
  show ?case
    using Cons.IH f1 f2
    sorry
qed

lemma "map id xs = xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "map id (x # xs) = id x # map id xs"
    sorry
  have f2: "id x = x"
    sorry
  have f3: "map id xs = xs"
    using Cons.IH
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f1 f2 f3
    sorry
qed

goal: set (xs @ ys) = set xs ∪ set ys
outline:
lemma "set (xs @ ys) = set xs ∪ set ys"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "set ((x # xs) @ ys) = insert x (set (xs @ ys))"
    by simp
  have f2: "insert x (set (xs @ ys)) = insert x (set xs ∪ set ys)"
    using Cons.IH
    sorry
  have f3: "insert x (set xs ∪ set ys) = set (x # xs) ∪ set ys"
    by simp
  show ?case

lemma "map id xs = xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "map id (x # xs) = id x # map id xs"
    by simp
  have f2: "map id xs = xs"
    using Cons.IH
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f1 f2
    sorry
qed

lemma "take (length xs) (xs @ ys) = xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  have f1: "length [] = 0"
    sorry
  have f2: "[] @ ys = ys"
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f1 f2
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  have f1: "length (a # as) = Suc (length as)"
    sorry
  have f2: "(a # as) @ ys = a # (as @ ys)"
    sorry
  have f3: "take (Suc (length as)) (a # (as @ ys)) = a # (take (length as) (as @ ys))"
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f1 f2 f3 Cons.IH
    sorry
qed

goal: map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys
outline:
lemma "map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "map f ((x # xs) @ ys) = f x # map f (xs @ ys)"
    sorry
  have f2: "f x # map f (xs @ ys) = f x # (map f xs @ map f ys)"
    using Cons.IH sorry
    sorry
  have f3: "map f (x # xs) @ map f ys = f x # (map f xs @ map f ys)"
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f1 f2 f3 sorry
    sorry
qed

goal: length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys
outline:
lemma "length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  have f1: "length ([] @ ys) = length ys" by simp
  show ?case using f1 by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "length ((x # xs) @ ys) = 1 + length (xs @ ys)" by simp
  have f2: "length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys" using Cons.IH by simp
  show ?case
    using f1 f2
    sorry
qed

goal: filter p (xs @ ys) = filter p xs @ filter p ys
outline:
lemma "filter p (xs @ ys) = filter p xs @ filter p ys"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  show ?case
  proof (cases "p x")
    case True
    have f1: "filter p ((x # xs) @ ys) = x # filter p (xs @ ys)"
      using True sorry
      sorry
    have f2: "filter p (x # xs) @ filter p ys = x # (filter p xs @ filter p ys)"
      using True sorry
      sorry
    show ?thesis
      using Cons.IH f1 f2 sorry
      sorry
  next
    case False
    have f3: "filter p ((x # xs) @ ys) = filter p (xs @ ys)"
      using False sorry
      sorry
    have f4: "filter p (x # xs) @ filter p ys = filter p xs @ filter p ys"
      using False sorry
      sorry
    show ?thesis
      using Cons.IH f3 f4 sorry
      sorry
  qed
qed

goal: map f (rev xs) = rev (map f xs)
outline:
lemma "map f (rev xs) = rev (map f xs)"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "map f (rev (x # xs)) = map f (rev xs @ [x])"
    by simp
  have f2: "map f (rev xs @ [x]) = map f (rev xs) @ [f x]"
    sorry
  have f3: "map f (rev xs) @ [f x] = rev (map f xs) @ [f x]"
    using Cons.IH
    by simp
  have f4: "rev (map f (x # xs)) = rev (f x # map f xs)"
    by simp
  have f5: "rev (f x # map f xs) = rev (map f xs) @ [f x]"
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f3 f5
    by simp
qed

qed

lemma "distinct xs ⟹ distinct (rev xs)"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "distinct xs"
    using Cons.prems
    by simp
  have f2: "x ∉ set xs"
    using Cons.prems
    by simp
  have f3: "distinct (rev xs)"
    using Cons.IH f1
    sorry
  have f4: "x ∉ set (rev xs)"
    using f2
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f3 f4
    sorry
qed

goal: take n xs @ drop n xs = xs
outline:
lemma "take n xs @ drop n xs = xs"
proof (induction n arbitrary: xs)
  case 0
  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Suc n)
  show ?case
  proof (cases xs)
    case Nil
    show ?thesis by simp
  next
    case (Cons y ys)
    have f1: "take (Suc n) (y # ys) = y # take n ys"
      by simp
    have f2: "drop (Suc n) (y # ys) = drop n ys"
      by simp
    have f3: "take n ys @ drop n ys = ys"
      using Suc.IH
      sorry
    show ?thesis
      sorry
      unfolding Cons f1 f2
      using f3
      sorry
  qed
qed

lemma "map f (filter p xs) = filter (λx. p x) (map f xs)"
proof (induction xs)

  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "map f (filter p xs) = filter (λx. p x) (map f xs)"
    using Cons.IH by simp
    sorry
  show ?case
  proof (cases "p x")
    case True
    have f2: "map f (filter p (x # xs)) = f x # map f (filter p xs)"
      using True by simp
      sorry
    have f3: "filter (λx. p x) (map f (x # xs)) = f x # filter (λx. p x) (map f xs)"
      using True sorry
      sorry
    show ?thesis
      using f1 f2 f3 by simp
      sorry
  next
    case False
    have f4: "map f (filter p (x # xs)) = map f (filter p xs)"
      using False by simp
      sorry
    have f5: "filter (λx. p x) (map f (x # xs)) = filter (λx. p x) (map f xs)"
      using False sorry
      sorry
    show ?thesis
      using f1 f4 f5 by simp
      sorry
  qed
qed

  show ?case by simp
next
  case (Cons x xs)
  have f1: "rev (x # xs) = rev xs @ [x]"
    by simp
  have f2: "length (rev (x # xs)) = length (rev xs @ [x])"
    using f1 by simp
    sorry
  have f3: "length (rev xs @ [x]) = length (rev xs) + length [x]"
    sorry
  have f4: "length (rev xs) = length xs"
    using Cons.IH by simp
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f2 f3 f4 by simp
    sorry
qed

qed

    by simp

    by simp
  show ?case
    using f1 f2
    by simp
next

  have f1: "rev ((x # xs) @ ys) = rev (xs @ ys) @ [x]"
    by simp
  have f2: "rev (xs @ ys) @ [x] = (rev ys @ rev xs) @ [x]"
    using Cons.IH
    sorry
  have f3: "(rev ys @ rev xs) @ [x] = rev ys @ (rev xs @ [x])"
    sorry
  show ?case
    using f1 f2 f3
    by simp
qed
